title: Fiery PvP
description: This Texture Pack will add PvP utilitys while keeping it creative! for example diamond and netherite armor and tools have cool fiery Textures!
body: This Texture Pack add's so many different Thing's You need for minecraft PvP! Your Totem can pop and u wont even notice on Your screen! it adds new Fiery type Texture's to the game to completely Enhance your PvP Experience! Please Enjoy! :)
